reviews.comment: Ethan and Henry helped me move into a 4th floor walk-up on a hot and muggy day and were total troopers about it. I've got two heavy dressers, a heavy bed frame, and had 27 boxes, plus a bunch of other random stuff. With just the two of them it took about three hours start to finish. There was good communication from when I first reached out for a quote, to the day-of when they gave me plenty of notice that they were running an hour behind. I would definitely recommend Comfort Moving to anyone who's looking for affordable service and friendly movers!
reviews.name: accounts/116507434882864969255/locations/10010227020373101361/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURKdnZUSGJ3EAE

reviews.comment: Fantastic experience! Comfort Moving Chicago made our move pain free. I couldn't believe how quickly and with care they loaded and unloaded all of our belongings. 10/10 would recommend and will use them for future moves! Great job!!

reviews.comment: Comfort moving was a great help they showed up on time, worked efficiently and saved my back! Thanks guys!
reviews.name: accounts/116507434882864969255/locations/10010227020373101361/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURKaU9mSjhBRRAB

reviews.comment: Highly recommend this moving company due to their professionalism, skill and friendliness. I had a great experience from start to finish. Upon filling out the initial inquiry for service, they responded within 1-2 hours and were able to help schedule my move immediately. They do require an initial deposit, though it’s credited to your balance at the end of the move. The movers were punctual and arrived right at the start time of the move. The move took about 3.5 hours in total and they moved my 1B/1BR along with my workout equipment. They also wrap all fragile/high value items and move with care. Next time I move, I’ll be using these guys again! Thanks!

reviews.comment:
I hired these guys to help me get a large elliptical machine out of a third story walk up condo.  I underestimated how difficult the job was going to be.  It was a complete pain and it took more than an hour.

Mateo and Henry were cordial on the phone, cooperative and professional with each other, and fortunately for me, intelligent and thoughtful problem solvers.

While my experience was with a smaller job, I’ll be using them in the future for moves of all sizes.  Terrific job from these guys.
reviews.name: accounts/116507434882864969255/locations/10010227020373101361/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNScjZ1X2NnEAE

reviews.comment: Late last night I was struggling trying to find movers for next day help-most moving companies quoted me over 500$ for two hours of work when I had my own rental truck and only needed to move three pieces of furniture and some boxes. When I spoke to Ethan he was super helpful and texted me promptly. I couldn’t ask for better help between Ethan and Henry. Super reliable and AFFORDABLE! Thank you guys again for all the help!
